name: Beambox Events and Conferences FAQ - Electronic Badges for Professional Use
description: Frequently asked questions about using Beambox electronic badges at events, conferences, trade shows, and corporate gatherings.

acceptedAnswer.text: Beambox is a programmable electronic badge and wearable display product line by Beambox. The Nikko E-Badge is a 2.7-inch e-ink name badge that can display QR codes, names, titles, and dynamic content. It is designed for professional events, coworking spaces, fan conventions, and personal expression.

mainEntity.name: How does Beambox work at conferences?

acceptedAnswer.text: Beambox e-badges pair with a smartphone app over Bluetooth. Conference organizers can pre-program attendee names, titles, and session QR codes. Attendees can update their badge content throughout the event. The e-ink display is always-on and readable in direct sunlight, making it ideal for large venue environments.

mainEntity.name: What are the key benefits of Beambox for event organizers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key benefits include: (1) reducing printing costs for physical badges, (2) enabling real-time attendee updates and session assignments, (3) providing a memorable and impressive attendee experience, (4) supporting custom branding on the badge, and (5) allowing post-event data collection through QR code scans. The reusable hardware also reduces the environmental footprint of large events.

mainEntity.name: Can Beambox badges be customized for corporate events?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Beambox supports custom badge content including company logos, color schemes, and branded QR codes. For bulk orders of 10 or more units, contact Beambox directly for event pricing and customization options. The badge frame and app interface can be configured to match corporate branding guidelines.

mainEntity.name: What is the battery life of Beambox Nikko E-Badge at events?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Beambox Nikko E-Badge has a battery life of approximately 2-3 weeks under typical event use with 3-5 content updates per day. The badge uses e-ink display technology, which only draws power when the content changes, not when it is static. This makes it highly reliable for multi-day conferences without charging concerns.

mainEntity.name: How do I order Beambox badges in bulk for an event?

acceptedAnswer.text: Visit the Beambox shop page at beambox.com.cn/pages/shop or contact the Beambox sales team directly. Bulk pricing is available for orders of 10 or more units. For conferences with hundreds or thousands of attendees, contact Beambox at least 6-8 weeks before your event date to ensure adequate production and programming time.
